classification: Numerical-implementation correction. NOT a research-design change.
authorized_cascade_conditions: The raw quadprog formulation is ALWAYS attempted first.
Rescue is permitted ONLY for the exact registered ValueError and message.
The original Stage-3 region must FIRST be independently confirmed feasible by the registered HiGHS probe.
The retry uses the SAME solver under the registered positive-diagonal coordinate transformation.
Every rescued result is accepted or rejected EXCLUSIVELY through checks performed in the ORIGINAL coordinates.
No alternate optimizer, fallback solver, third attempt, regularization, jitter, tolerance relaxation, or inclusion-floor change is permitted.
Every other solver exception or warning remains IMMEDIATELY FATAL.
aborted_run_disposition: Must not be resumed. No state from diagnostic or floor-sweep runs may be reused. The development run restarts from session 1 on clean immutable state.
authorized_restart_sequence: 1. Rebuild and hash the Linux/amd64 research image.
2. Update and hash the solver-runtime manifest and dependency records.
4. Rerun the 124-session structural slice and confirm all 124 executable-decision hashes remain unchanged.
5. Restart the complete A/B/C 1,700-session development run from session 1 on clean immutable state.
6. Produce the registered byte-identical same-image rerun.

blindness_state_at_countersign.note: Performance inspection remains prohibited until the clean development run completes.

amendment_rule: Any change to this countersigned artifact or to the registered cascade requires a new artifact hash and explicit adjudication. This countersign is stored as a separate immutable record because appending it to the Markdown would change the artifact bytes and invalidate the hash above.
